'''Ludo Kressh's War Sword''' was a [[Sith sword|Sith]] [[Longsword/Legends|war sword]] used by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ludo Kressh]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].

Like many [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] of his time, the Sith Lord Ludo Kressh preferred the more visceral feel of a traditional metal blade, over the [[Sith lightsaber/Legends|Sith lightsabers]] that were becoming popular among his brethren. His blade was very similar to other Sith war swords of the time, but was strongly infused with [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] energy using [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]].<ref name="KOTORCGWE4" /> This blade was used against [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] while the two disputed who was to be the next [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. Later, once again during an argument with Naga Sadow over who was more qualified to be the next [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], he slammed his sword upon the ground and destroyed the nearly-indestructible weapon as a show of his disapproval.

==Behind the scenes==
In the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the sword makes an appearance as a double-bladed weapon in the [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh]], despite being single-bladed and having been destroyed in ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith]]''. In addition, the KOTOR Campaign Guide Web Enhancement 4: Heirloom Items states that the weapon is a War Sword, a standard single-bladed sword.
